parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved primary study materially links MDM2 to TCR signalling inhibition or a closely related inhibitory T cell phenotype (checkpoint, anergy, hyporesponsiveness, or TCR-linked exhaustion). Papers are dominated by tumor-intrinsic oncology (liposarcoma, breast cancer, glioblastoma, ameloblastoma, keratinocytes) and biochemical p53-MDM2 work. The two papers touching immunity (PMC11388719, PMC11251213) are reviews focused on enhancing antitumor immunity and cannot independently support a tier; neither documents MDM2 altering TCR signalling or an inhibitory T cell state.
